Our standards are what define us
1 We are not the highest version of ourselves which we can imagine.
We are the lowest version of ourselves which we can accept.

fight like hell to not breach your standards. As humans we will do
more to not loose something than we will to gain it.
If you want to achieve your dreams and goals you must turn them
into irrefutable standards.
